Section 2 - Lesson: #5: Energy/Rapport/Belief
The whole point of this section is to figure out what routine will become your closing routine
to set you up to be on fire every time.
For me, I looked back on the days that I really crushed it and saw commonalities, and now I
purposefully try and recreate that environment.
1. I hear an amazing testimonial from a client. Read testimonials from clients,
especially people you signed up recently
2. Work out in the morning
3. Be in an awesome playful mood. Do the Bernie dance to make myself feel
silly & likeable
4. Wow the customer with a “Happy Tuesday!!” or whatever day it is as soon as
they walk in the door. MAKE THEIR DAY.
BELIEF IS NUMBER ONE.
I could dedicate more room to this because it is the most important. If you do not believe
1000% in the product you are selling…STOP. Fuck the script, and go learn more about the
product and people’s lives who have been changed by it. If you do not believe that this is
truly the best (and I do – I can look you in the eyes and say that), then that will be what hold
you back. Not the script. The delivery. The energy. None of it. Just your belief. I could go on
about this, but this is the REAL shit that makes people close. Not the fancy shit. It comes
down to balls and guts, and that comes from BELIEF.
You either believe in your product or service’s ability to solve the prospect’s problem, or they
believe in their excuse stopping them. The stronger belief will win.
This is the number one reason people stop selling well – they hear a complaint or a bad
review and they second-guess their product. They don’t notice it, but it starts subconsciously.
So to reverse this, I constantly am reading reviews and testimonials on our page. I also have
seen thousands of lives changed by the program, so I am bought in. And we are constantly
making this program truly unbelievable in terms of value, and I know that, because I’m the
one doing it. Go through the content if you want to, to check it out. We’ve spent A LOT of
time working on it.
RAPPORT & ENERGY
People need to like you to buy from you.
People need to trust you to buy from you.
^That’s pretty much it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

So what things can you do to get someone to like you and trust you.
The simple shit, the fundamentals that people forget about. Fuck the one-liners. Smile.
Laugh. Make their day.
“HAPPY WHATEVER DAY IT IS!!”
Ask them rapid fire questions. It elevates the conversation and gets them on their toes. YOU
dictate the tone of this conversation, not them.
Do your Bernie dance or whatever habit or ritual you can do to consistently get yourself in a
good mood.
Think of this as your free throw ritual or your at bat ritual.
WRITE THIS DOWN…AND ACTUALLY DO IT.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 2 --
